# Features skipped by CI test matrices (autogenerated + scenarios).
#
# Principle: everything we do not have to maintain is profit.
# Prefer official > mature community > reimplement for pure "install tool X".
# CI only owns features that differentiate this monorepo (Claude Code policy,
# security/audit enforcement, devcontainer meta, unique stacks).
#
# Skipped features may remain in src/ for existing consumers; we do not
# burn CI minutes keeping their install scripts green.
# One id per line; lines starting with # are comments.

# --- Prefer official (devcontainers/features) ---
git-lfs
nix-package-manager

# --- Prefer community: bare CLI / single-tool installers ---
1password-cli
act-runner
container-security-scan
corporate-cert-injector
cosign-verify
direnv-integration
duckdb-analytics
git-hooks-manager
gitleaks-scan
meilisearch-cli
mise
mkdocs-material
newman-testing
nvidia-container-toolkit
ollama-cli
pandoc-convert
playwright-testing
postgres-dev
redis-dev
sonar-scanner
sops-secret-manager
starship-prompt
syft-sbom
taskfile-dev
tmux-terminal
xai-cli
